title: Change Status Column Labels Via API
excerpt: We have a board of “kits” I want the ability for our staff members to checkout kits. I would like to have a form with a dropdown where they can choose an available kit. So I am wondering, is it possible via the API to ch…

posts.author: nsheetz86 (Nick Sheetz)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a board of “kits” I want the ability for our staff members to checkout kits. I would like to have a form with a dropdown where they can choose an available kit. So I am wondering, is it possible via the API to change the labels of a status column? This would help me get the functionality that I desire.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @nsheetz86!

This will depend on the exact action you want to perform on the labels.

You can find the information about how to use the API to check and update status column here.

Let us know if you have any questions regarding the documentation!

Cheers,
Matias
